race.description: Duttons Easy To Do Business With! Maiden Plate
race.comment: WINE SNOB (6) chased gamely into second when resuming here a fortnight ago and will take natural improvement from that. Can go one better. LOSEYATOETOE (12) appeared to lack a fitness edge late when finishing fourth but strips fitter for that run. The draw is tricky, so she'll need a smart ride. HEALTHANDHAPPINESS (2) is a Wootton Bassett gelding on debut for the Clarken camp. Has shown promise in trials and draws ideally in barrier one for Pannell. Worth keeping a close eye on. NORDIC VIKING (5) makes his stable debut for the Theodore yard after arriving from NSW. His form from last campaign would have these covered but he's yet to fire a shot this time in. Change of scenery could spark improvement. FOREVER A DIAMOND (7) is knocking on the door and has to be included.
